attributes.action: Keep ORE 2 exam fees the same for dentist who want to appear for the exam.
attributes.additional_details: Rising ORE fees will delay candidates and reduce the number of overseas dentists entering the UK, worsening NHS access. Millions already lack an NHS dentist, and a 105% increase within a year creates further barriers. Lowering fees would support recruitment; otherwise, dentists may choose other European countries, deepening the UK shortage
attributes.background: The GDC’s rise of ORE Part 2 fees to £7,000—after 45% and 65% increases in a year—creates major financial barriers for overseas dentists. This risks worsening UK workforce shortages, limiting access to care, and discouraging qualified professionals from entering the system.

rejection.details: ORE and other dentist fees are a matter for the GDC not the Government.
